purpose: Engine-neutral canonical system map for Mind Warp Forge Phase 0.

systems.purpose: Validate bounded whole-system mechanism assessments, enforce hybrid divergence triggers and budgets, rank one target-local probe, and preserve deterministic mainline reconnection without execution or authority.
systems.proof: Eight deterministic fixtures cover three-batch and event triggers, complete registry mapping, ten-percent and one-batch budgets, VOI/local-net-gain ranking, malformed metaphors/probabilities, ordinary-edit non-triggering, aggregate-regression quarantine, two-module transfer eligibility, deterministic replay and checkpoint binding; the live-registry verifier checks all 31 systems.

systems.purpose: Reconstruct exact shared-face path evidence and declared conditional incident-direction boxes into bounded local three-band smooth-dielectric power and direction enclosures.
systems.proof: Warnings-denied native and executable i686 Windows lanes pass 12 unit, 7 interval integration and 1 point-v1 identity-lock test; Android ARM64 compiles. Point-v1 canonical bytes and IDs remain fixed. Conditional boxes fail closed on order, zero-vector, unit-sphere, orientation, codec, scale, volume and identity poison; RGB branches are independent; each uniform band executes once at fixed 160 under the derived 452/512-bit shield. Input/event bytes measure 1,741/2,803 against 16/64 KiB pre-decode caps, decoded structures measure 608/1,528 bytes, and the independent certificate passes 2,340 checks. Actual mobile-device execution and profiling remain later promotion gates.

systems.purpose: Compile explicit stellar source and bounded elliptical-orbit inputs into deterministic distance, irradiation and normalized-period-squared evidence before geological or atmospheric rules.
systems.proof: Seven focused tests cover strict canonical replay, circular and eccentric distance bounds, inverse-square irradiation, normalized Kepler period-squared behavior, luminosity/orbit separation, hostile ranges and bytes, claim/identity drift and plausible fabricated-state rejection; a read-only ProofReceipt/Reference Studio fixture passes without authority mutation. This is a bounded two-body integer reference only; multi-star dynamics, perturbations, phase, production ephemerides, stellar evolution, scientific validation and downstream planet layers remain open.

systems.purpose: Compile exact stellar/orbital evidence and declared planetary bulk, column and attenuation inputs into bounded gravity, pressure, heat, substrate and direct-transmission evidence.
systems.proof: Seven focused tests cover strict canonical replay, earth-normalized gravity and pressure, independent mass/radius/column causality, per-band gas/aerosol attenuation, hostile ranges and bytes, foreign stellar state, plausible fabricated public state and claim drift; a read-only ProofReceipt passes without authority mutation. This is a bounded spherical gravity and column reference only; composition, vertical structure, weather, climate, hydrology, materials, tectonics, habitability, scientific validation and runtime simulation remain open.

This is a scalar plausibility seam only: temperature, greenhouse solving, weather, circulation, clouds, materials, habitability, scientific validation and runtime simulation remain open.

systems.purpose: Reconstruct exact physical-path evidence into bounded three-band single-medium direct-beam optical-depth and transmission bounds before interface optics, perception or rendering.

systems.purpose: Compile strict physical-cause packets and derived environmental opportunities for world conditions, signals and palette bounds before organism ecology, aesthetics or representation.

Seven environmental-opportunity tests rebuild typed energy, liquid, atmosphere, substrate and signal nodes from the exact packet chain and reject absence contradictions, fabricated nodes and incomplete relations; five macro-lineage and 41 desktop integration tests pass. Signal propagation, biome structure, complete niches, physical visibility, traversability, scientific validation and second-platform evidence remain open.

systems.purpose: Addressable, lazy materialisation from galaxy to entity with cache and promotion policy.
systems.proof: Strict deterministic descriptors, explicit origin, stable finite windows capped at 256, stale/cancel/budget rejection, and residency-negative identity fixtures. addressable-world-binding now requires exact WorldGenerationInput/CausalWorldPacket replay and rejects a packet from another input (5 focused tests), with a read-only ProofReceipt and no Kernel lifecycle mutation. The lifecycle slice now validates public and reconstructed state, rejects ambient appearance locks and hostile stored values, continues sequence across drive batches, and suppresses no-op deltas. These are bounded components only: C4 is dependency-gated by reopened C3 and its full addressable-state/history scope, production generation and cross-platform receipts remain open.

systems.purpose: Define the player promise, fixed base loop, progression, encounter grammar and one runtime-independent vertical through GP0-GP4.
systems.proof: GP0 fixes one strict causal_explorer_maker concept and five corrected authored sessions. GP1 adds one shared deterministic six-phase loop, repairable failure, typed stable stops, exact run/event/session/outcome append receipts, optional exact C3A context and predecessor-sensitive S1-to-S5 consequence. GP2 implements eighteen private explicit rules across five typed nonfungible lanes with exact GP1 terminal digest authority and deterministic pairwise-incomparable strategies; registered full-gate verification passed in run-2dc3db644adc416a8ef56461dbb771b6. C4V binds C2/C3A/GP1 through seven adversarial persistence tests and registered proof. GP3 is promoted with five fixed multi-domain authored situations, 18 exact approaches, complete GP0 consequence references, strict pinned codecs and registered complete gate run-50a8c78043eb46c483f1f655d3793f9b. GP4 Signal Anchor passes strict received-evidence replay, 9 hostile tests, exact C4V/GP3/GP2 binding, 25 semantic slots, 29 unmeasured requirements, independent source review, focused integration and registered complete gate run-7e5c44dc8f48424a8cec42da756e3127. The exact typed bounded vertical closeout receipt is recorded; broad G1-CLOSEOUT and all runtime selection remain gated.
